subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, the Sovereign, the Just, the Manifest, unto him who hath believed in God and His Most Great Sign in this Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله الملک العدل المبین الی الذی آمن بالله و آیته الکبری فی یوم
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
